summary: Sprint 17.5c pre-mint bug fixes testing complete. Both critical bugs are FIXED: (1) X dispatcher TypeError resolved via authlib OAuth1Auth swap - no ASGI crashes, dispatcher fails gracefully with 'no_credentials'. (2) DexScreener 429 rate-limit hardening implemented - POLL_SECONDS=60, exponential backoff schedule active, vault_state fields present. All 101 pytest tests pass. Frontend regression clean (AdminBots Preview + Cabinet tab working). Separate pre-existing bug found in news_repost.py (not Sprint 17.5c related).

separate_issues.issue: TypeError: object bool can't be used in 'await' expression at lines 300 and 555
separate_issues.details: _platform_creds_present() returns bool but is being awaited
separate_issues.impact: news_repost_status_endpoint and news repost worker crash
separate_issues.note: Pre-existing bug, NOT introduced by Sprint 17.5c

passed_tests: ✅ Pytest suite: 101/101 tests passed (90 prior + 11 new Sprint 17.5c tests)
✅ X dispatcher authlib swap: No '_OAuth1Adapter' or 'auth must inherit httpx.Auth' errors
✅ X dispatcher live mode: Queue item with platform='x' processed without ASGI crash
✅ X dispatcher graceful failure: Fails with 'no_credentials' when OAuth 1.0a creds missing
✅ DexScreener vault_state fields: dex_backoff_until, dex_429_streak, dex_last_429_at present
✅ DexScreener poll loop: Running with 60s cadence, no errors
✅ Backend API: Admin login, bot config, generate-preview, preview/push all working
✅ Backend API: Release-now with kill-switch ON/OFF working
✅ Backend API: Cabinet endpoints (welcome-signal, interaction-bot) working
✅ Frontend: AdminBots page accessible and functional
